Item g.

If \(\beta\) is another monotone increasing function on \([a, b]\) and \(f_{1} \in \cR(\beta)\) on \([a, b]\text{,}\) then \(f_{1} \in cR(\alpha +\beta)\) on \([a, b]\) and
\begin{equation*} \int_{a}^{b} f_{1} d(\alpha+\beta) = \int_{a}^{b} f_{1} d\alpha + \int_{a}^{b} f_{1} d\beta. \end{equation*}
in-context
